system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

You sit down and meditate for several hours, then channel Qi through your hands into another person to purge them of Mental Afflictions. This must be used Cathartically and takes hours to perform. Cathartic: On a Success you successfully purge a Mental Affliction from the target. On a Total Success you purge up to two Mental Afflictions. On a Failure you take 3 additional Imbalance Points for using this Technique cathartically. After purging, the target must rest for 12 hours.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: Must be used Cathartically and takes hours to perform.
